---
title: "03_exploratory_analysis"
author: "Bella Oleksy"
date: "2024-11-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
#source scripts
source("scripts/00_functions.R")
source("scripts/00_libraries.R")
source("scripts/01.1_LochO_data_munging.R")
source("scripts/01.2_Bear_Lake_SNOTEL.R")
source("scripts/01.3_NADP_CO98.R")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width=18, fig.height=11)
```


# Explore correlations

Explore correlations between fluxes and climate and deposition

```{r cars}
#Compile all the outlet flux data, separate column per 
annual_flux_wide <- annual_flux %>%
  select(-annual_flux_kg) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = chem_name, values_from = annual_flux_kg_per_ha, names_prefix = "annual_flux_") %>%
  rename(annual_flux_NH4_N=`annual_flux_NH4-N`,
         annual_flux_NO3_N=`annual_flux_NO3-N`,
         annual_flux_SO4_S=`annual_flux_SO4-S`)

summer_flux_wide <- summer_flux %>%
  select(-summer_flux_kg) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = chem_name, values_from = summer_flux_kg_per_ha, names_prefix = "summer_flux_") %>%
    rename(summer_flux_NH4_N=`summer_flux_NH4-N`,
        summer_flux_NO3_N=`summer_flux_NO3-N`,
        summer_flux_SO4_S=`summer_flux_SO4-S`)

monthly_flux_wide <- monthly_flux %>%
  mutate(chem_name = case_match(
    chem_name,
    "NH4-N" ~ "NH4_N",
    "NO3-N" ~ "NO3_N",
    "SO4-S" ~ "SO4_S",
    .default = chem_name
  )) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(chem_name, month), values_from = value, names_prefix = "flux_")


annual_dep_wide <- annual_dep %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = deposition_name,
              values_from = deposition_kg_per_ha_impute,
              names_prefix = "annual_dep_") %>%
  rename(
    annual_dep_NH4_N = `annual_dep_NH4-N`,
    annual_dep_NO3_N = `annual_dep_NO3-N`,
    annual_dep_SO4_S = `annual_dep_SO4-S`,
    annual_dep_IN = `annual_dep_Inorganic N`
  )

SWE_annual <- SWE_stats %>%
  select(waterYear, max_swe)

all_vars <- annual_flux_wide %>%
  left_join(., summer_flux_wide, by="waterYear") %>%
  left_join(., monthly_flux_wide, by="waterYear") %>%
  left_join(., annual_dep_wide, by="waterYear") %>%
  left_join(., SWE_annual, by="waterYear") %>%
  left_join(., annual_RP %>% select(waterYear, RP), by="waterYear") %>%
  left_join(., met_monthly_wide, by="waterYear")

## Add in the met data
```


## Correlation matrix
```{r}
#Look for potentially spurious correlations
all_vars <- all_vars %>%
  filter(!waterYear==1989) #RUINING EVERYTHING!

res <- rcorr(as.matrix(all_vars[,2:ncol(all_vars)]),
              type="spearman")
correlations<-flattenCorrMatrix(res$r, res$P)

all_flux <- all_vars %>% ungroup() %>% select(contains("flux")) %>% colnames()

cations_names <- all_vars %>% ungroup() %>% select(contains("flux_cation")) %>% colnames()
correlations_cations<-correlations%>%
  filter(row %in% cations_names) %>%
  filter(!column %in% all_flux) %>%
  # filter(p < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(p = round(p, digits=3),
         cor = round(cor, digits=2))

write_csv(correlations_cations,"data/export/correlations_cations.csv")


SO4_names <- all_vars %>% ungroup() %>% select(contains("flux_SO4")) %>% colnames()
correlations_SO4<-correlations%>%
  filter(row %in% SO4_names) %>%
  filter(!column %in% all_flux) %>%
  # filter(p < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(p = round(p, digits=3),
         cor = round(cor, digits=2))
write_csv(correlations_SO4,"data/export/correlations_SO4.csv")

NO3_names <- all_vars %>% ungroup() %>% select(contains("flux_NO3")) %>% colnames()
correlations_NO3<-correlations%>%
  filter(row %in% NO3_names) %>%
  filter(!column %in% all_flux) %>%
  # filter(p < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(p = round(p, digits=3),
         cor = round(cor, digits=2))
write_csv(correlations_NO3,"data/export/correlations_NO3.csv")

NH4_names <- all_vars %>% ungroup() %>% select(contains("flux_NH4")) %>% colnames()
correlations_NH4<-correlations%>%
  filter(row %in% NH4_names) %>%
  filter(!column %in% all_flux) %>%
  filter(p < 0.05) 

SiO2_names <- all_vars %>% ungroup() %>% select(contains("flux_SiO2")) %>% colnames()
correlations_SiO2<-correlations%>%
  filter(row %in% SiO2_names) %>%
  filter(!column %in% all_flux) %>%
  # filter(p < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(p = round(p, digits=3),
         cor = round(cor, digits=2))
write_csv(correlations_SiO2,"data/export/correlations_SiO2.csv")

```

### Export cation flux plots
```{r}

correlations_cations_trim <- correlations_cations %>%
  filter(!column %in% c("annual_dep_IN","annual_dep_NH4_N","annual_dep_SO4_S")) #remove spurious relationships


# Define output directory for plots
output_dir <- "figures/correlations/cation flux"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# Iterate over each row in the correlations data
for (i in seq_len(nrow(correlations_cations_trim))) {
  # Extract the variable names and correlation coefficient
  var_x <- correlations_cations_trim$row[i]
  var_y <- correlations_cations_trim$column[i]
  cor_value <- round(correlations_cations_trim$cor[i], 3)
  
  # Check if both variables are present in all_vars
  if (var_x %in% colnames(all_vars) && var_y %in% colnames(all_vars)) {
    # Create the plot
    p <- ggplot(all_vars, aes_string(x = var_x, y = var_y)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Scatterplot of", var_x, "vs", var_y),
        x = var_x,
        y = var_y
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = paste("Spearman Correlation:", cor_value),
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
        size = 5, color = "blue"
      ) +
      theme_few()
    
    # Save the plot
    plot_filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_", var_x, "_vs_", var_y, ".png"))
    ggsave(plot_filename, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units="in", dpi=600)
  }
}


```

### Export NO3 plots
```{r}

correlations_NO3_trim <- correlations_NO3 %>%
  filter(!column %in% c("annual_dep_cations")) #remove spurious relationships


# Define output directory for plots
output_dir <- "figures/correlations/nitrate flux"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# Iterate over each row in the correlations data
for (i in seq_len(nrow(correlations_NO3_trim))) {
  # Extract the variable names and correlation coefficient
  var_x <- correlations_NO3_trim$row[i]
  var_y <- correlations_NO3_trim$column[i]
  cor_value <- round(correlations_NO3_trim$cor[i], 3)
  
  # Check if both variables are present in all_vars
  if (var_x %in% colnames(all_vars) && var_y %in% colnames(all_vars)) {
    # Create the plot
    p <- ggplot(all_vars, aes_string(x = var_x, y = var_y)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Scatterplot of", var_x, "vs", var_y),
        x = var_x,
        y = var_y
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = paste("Spearman Correlation:", cor_value),
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
        size = 5, color = "blue"
      ) +
      theme_few()
    
    # Save the plot
    plot_filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_", var_x, "_vs_", var_y, ".png"))
    ggsave(plot_filename, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units="in", dpi=600)
  }
}


```

### Export NH4 plots
```{r}

#These are all spurious so I didn't plot them

```

### Export SiO2 plots
```{r}

correlations_SiO2_trim <- correlations_SiO2 %>%
  filter(!column %in% c("annual_dep_IN","annual_dep_NO3_N","annual_dep_cations")) #remove spurious relationships


# Define output directory for plots
output_dir <- "figures/correlations/silica flux"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# Iterate over each row in the correlations data
for (i in seq_len(nrow(correlations_SiO2_trim))) {
  # Extract the variable names and correlation coefficient
  var_x <- correlations_SiO2_trim$row[i]
  var_y <- correlations_SiO2_trim$column[i]
  cor_value <- round(correlations_SiO2_trim$cor[i], 3)
  
  # Check if both variables are present in all_vars
  if (var_x %in% colnames(all_vars) && var_y %in% colnames(all_vars)) {
    # Create the plot
    p <- ggplot(all_vars, aes_string(x = var_x, y = var_y)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Scatterplot of", var_x, "vs", var_y),
        x = var_x,
        y = var_y
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = paste("Spearman Correlation:", cor_value),
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
        size = 5, color = "blue"
      ) +
      theme_few()
    
    # Save the plot
    plot_filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_", var_x, "_vs_", var_y, ".png"))
    ggsave(plot_filename, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units="in", dpi=600)
  }
}


```


### Export SO4 plots
```{r}

correlations_SO4_trim <- correlations_SO4 %>%
  filter(!column %in% c("annual_dep_NH4_N","annual_dep_IN","annual_dep_cations")) #remove spurious relationships


# Define output directory for plots
output_dir <- "figures/correlations/sulfate flux"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# Iterate over each row in the correlations data
for (i in seq_len(nrow(correlations_SO4_trim))) {
  # Extract the variable names and correlation coefficient
  var_x <- correlations_SO4_trim$row[i]
  var_y <- correlations_SO4_trim$column[i]
  cor_value <- round(correlations_SO4_trim$cor[i], 3)
  
  # Check if both variables are present in all_vars
  if (var_x %in% colnames(all_vars) && var_y %in% colnames(all_vars)) {
    # Create the plot
    p <- ggplot(all_vars, aes_string(x = var_x, y = var_y)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Scatterplot of", var_x, "vs", var_y),
        x = var_x,
        y = var_y
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = paste("Spearman Correlation:", cor_value),
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
        size = 5, color = "blue"
      ) +
      theme_few()
    
    # Save the plot
    plot_filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_", var_x, "_vs_", var_y, ".png"))
    ggsave(plot_filename, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units="in", dpi=600)
  }
}


```



#Look at extremes for SWE, RP, July temps
```{r}

all_vars_groupings <- all_vars %>%
  ungroup() %>%
    mutate(Tmax2M_Jul_quantile=cut_number(Tmax2M_Jul, 8, labels=FALSE),
         max_swe_quantile=cut_number(max_swe,8, labels=FALSE),
         RP_quantile=cut_number(RP,8, labels=FALSE),
         )

all_vars_groupings %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=annual_flux_cations, y=max_swe, color=factor(max_swe_quantile)))+
  geom_point()

write_csv(all_vars_groupings, "data/export/all_variables_by_waterYear.csv")

```

# Plot climate trends
## Maximum monthly temps
```{r}


met_monthly_max_nested <- met_monthly %>%
  rename(value=Tmax2M) %>%
  select(-Tave2M, -Tmin2M) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  filter(waterYear > 1984 & waterYear < 2023) %>%
  # filter(!waterYear==1986) %>% #Lots of missing data for c("SO4-S","cations")
  group_by(month) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    sens = map(data, map_sens),
    sens_sum = map(sens, broom::glance),
    slope = map(sens, sens_slope),
    zyp_mod = map(data, map_zyp),
    intercept = map(zyp_mod, sens_intercept)
  )


## Un-nest 
met_monthly_max_unnested = unnest(met_monthly_max_nested, c(sens_sum, slope, month)) %>%
  mutate(
    trend = case_when(
      p.value <= 0.05 & slope >= 0 ~ 'increasing',
      p.value <= 0.05 & slope <= 0 ~ 'decreasing',
      p.value > 0.05 ~ 'no trend'
    ),
    trend = factor(trend,
                       levels = c('no trend',
                                  'increasing',
                                  'decreasing'))
  )

#Extract all covariates for modeling...
met_monthly_max_trends <- met_monthly_max_unnested %>%
  select(month, slope, p.value, intercept, trend) %>%
  unnest(c(slope)) %>%
  mutate(intercept = as.numeric(intercept))

met_monthly %>%
  filter(!waterYear==1984 )%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=waterYear, y=Tmax2M))+
  geom_point()+
  facet_wrap(~month, scales="free_y")+
  geom_abline(data = met_monthly_max_trends %>% filter(!trend=="no trend"), aes(intercept = intercept, slope = slope)) +
  labs(title="Maximum monthly temperature by month",
       y="Temperature °C",
       x="Year")+
  theme_few()
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/monthly_max_temps.png")
```

## Average monthly temps
```{r}

met_monthly_ave_nested <- met_monthly %>%
  rename(value=Tave2M) %>%
  select(-Tmax2M, -Tmin2M) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  filter(waterYear > 1984 & waterYear < 2023) %>%
  # filter(!waterYear==1986) %>% #Lots of missing data for c("SO4-S","cations")
  group_by(month) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    sens = map(data, map_sens),
    sens_sum = map(sens, broom::glance),
    slope = map(sens, sens_slope),
    zyp_mod = map(data, map_zyp),
    intercept = map(zyp_mod, sens_intercept)
  )


## Un-nest 
met_monthly_ave_unnested = unnest(met_monthly_ave_nested, c(sens_sum, slope, month)) %>%
  mutate(
    trend = case_when(
      p.value <= 0.05 & slope >= 0 ~ 'increasing',
      p.value <= 0.05 & slope <= 0 ~ 'decreasing',
      p.value > 0.05 ~ 'no trend'
    ),
    trend = factor(trend,
                       levels = c('no trend',
                                  'increasing',
                                  'decreasing'))
  )

#Extract all covariates for modeling...
met_monthly_ave_trends <- met_monthly_ave_unnested %>%
  select(month, slope, p.value, intercept, trend) %>%
  unnest(c(slope)) %>%
  mutate(intercept = as.numeric(intercept))


met_monthly %>%
    filter(!waterYear==1984 )%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=waterYear, y=Tave2M))+
  geom_point()+
    facet_wrap(~month, scales="free_y")+
  geom_abline(data = met_monthly_ave_trends %>% filter(!trend=="no trend"), aes(intercept = intercept, slope = slope)) +
  labs(title="Average monthly temperature by month",
              y="Temperature °C",
       x="Year")+
  theme_few()
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/monthly_ave_temps.png")

```

## Minimum monthly temps
```{r}

met_monthly_min_nested <- met_monthly %>%
  rename(value=Tmin2M) %>%
  select(-Tmax2M, -Tave2M) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  filter(waterYear > 1984 & waterYear < 2023) %>%
  # filter(!waterYear==1986) %>% #Lots of missing data for c("SO4-S","cations")
  group_by(month) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    sens = map(data, map_sens),
    sens_sum = map(sens, broom::glance),
    slope = map(sens, sens_slope),
    zyp_mod = map(data, map_zyp),
    intercept = map(zyp_mod, sens_intercept)
  )


## Un-nest 
met_monthly_min_unnested = unnest(met_monthly_min_nested, c(sens_sum, slope, month)) %>%
  mutate(
    trend = case_when(
      p.value <= 0.05 & slope >= 0 ~ 'increasing',
      p.value <= 0.05 & slope <= 0 ~ 'decreasing',
      p.value > 0.05 ~ 'no trend'
    ),
    trend = factor(trend,
                       levels = c('no trend',
                                  'increasing',
                                  'decreasing'))
  )

#Extract all covariates for modeling...
met_monthly_min_trends <- met_monthly_min_unnested %>%
  select(month, slope, p.value, intercept, trend) %>%
  unnest(c(slope)) %>%
  mutate(intercept = as.numeric(intercept))


met_monthly %>%
    filter(!waterYear==1984 )%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=waterYear, y=Tmin2M))+
  geom_point()+
  facet_wrap(~month, scales="free_y")+
  geom_abline(data = met_monthly_min_trends %>% filter(!trend=="no trend"), aes(intercept = intercept, slope = slope)) +
  labs(title="Minimum monthly temperature by month",
              y="Temperature °C",
       x="Year")+
  theme_few()+
  theme()
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/monthly_min_temps.png")

```

## Max SWE at Bear Lake
```{r}

SWE_stats %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=waterYear, y=max_swe_doy))+
  geom_point()+
  labs(y="Day of max SWE (DOY since Jan 1)",
       x="Water year")+
    theme_few()
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/SWE_doy_max.png")

SWE_stats %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=waterYear, y=max_swe))+
  geom_point()+
  labs(y="Maximum snow water equivelent (mm)",
       x="Water year")+
    theme_few()
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/MaxSWE.png")

```

## R:P
```{r}

annual_RP %>%
  filter(waterYear < 2023) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=waterYear, y=RP, label=waterYear))+
  geom_hline(yintercept=mean(annual_RP$RP), color="red")+
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, color="grey", linetype="dashed")+
  geom_col()+
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  geom_text_repel(box.padding = 0.5, max.overlaps = 1) +
  theme_few()+
  labs(y="R:P",
       x="Water Year")
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/RP_by_waterYear.png")


all_vars_groupings %>%
  mutate(SWE_extremes = case_when(max_swe_quantile == 8 ~ "Low SWE years",
                                  max_swe_quantile == 1 ~ "High SWE years",
                                  TRUE ~ NA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=RP, x=waterYear, fill=SWE_extremes)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=21)+
  theme_few()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("green","red","white"))+
  labs(x="Water Year",
       y="R:P",
       caption="High SWE years = green, Low SWE years = red, all others grey")
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/RP_by_waterYear_colorSWE.png")


all_vars_groupings %>%
  mutate(RP_extremes = case_when(RP_quantile == 8 ~ "Low R:P years",
                                  RP_quantile == 1 ~ "High R:P years",
                                  TRUE ~ NA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=max_swe, x=waterYear, fill=RP_extremes)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=21)+
  theme_few()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("red","cyan","white"))+
  labs(x="Water Year",
       y="Max SWE (mm)",
       caption="High R:P years = red, Low R:P years = cyan, all others grey")
ggsave("figures/climate_trends/SWE_by_waterYear_colorRP.png")


```
